## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategy for newly acquired domain (chosendata.com) and explore content creation opportunities for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Potential to create a portfolio of brands/sites to support GrowthX's main offering](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Opportunity to showcase GrowthX's AI-led growth strategies through high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Collaboration between Jason and Branko to develop a content hub focused on AI-led growth and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Topics

### Domain Strategy Options

  - [Two main ideas: building a portfolio of brands or simple redirection](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [chosendata.com has a strong background profile (DR 46), trademark, and social handles](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Potential to use as a showcase for GrowthX's AI-led growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Option to redirect to growthx.ai or create a new branded content hub](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

### SEMrush Portfolio Case Study

  - [SEMrush acquired multiple brands (e.g., Backlinko, Traffic Think Tank) to dominate SERP real estate](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Backlinko generated significant traffic (400k-600k sessions/month) and new user MRR](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [7-8x ROI achieved through strategic content and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Content Strategy for GrowthX

  - [Focus on first-hand experiences and high-quality, research-backed content](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Potential to involve community members or GrowthX team as contributors](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Showcase AI-led growth strategies and tools, similar to Backlinko's SEMrush integrations](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Maintain a high bar for quality, comparable to respected research labs](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Branding and Positioning

  - [Keep distance between GrowthX and the new content hub to maintain authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Consider creating a separate brand for the AI-led growth community and content](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Explore options for naming and structuring the portfolio of GrowthX offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Collaboration and Workload

  - [Jason and Branko expressed interest in working together on this project](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Aim to allocate 20-30% of time for content hub development](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Balance client work with internal growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Process Improvement

  - [Leverage Branko's experience in building content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to streamline and automate content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to develop initial thoughts on content hub structure and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Branko to share examples of successful portfolio brand strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting next week to officially kick off the project](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Explore ways to balance client work with internal growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Discuss Branko's potential involvement in product development and company growth with leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/zSZ4TfyLZm4N1NyzzDsXxPU89NuiuGvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
